title: Features
lead: LetterLab helps you draft professional messages faster while keeping you in control of tone, structure, and intent. Every tool is designed to support clear communication—not replace your voice.

seo.title: Features | LetterLab
seo.description: Professional writing assistance with tone control, clarity, and consistency.

sections.label: Core Engine
sections.title: Draft faster without losing your voice
sections.paragraph: LetterLab generates structured first drafts that respect your intent. Instead of replacing your writing style, it provides a clean starting point you can refine with clarity and control.
bullets: Generate a structured draft in seconds
Adjust tone between formal, neutral, and friendly

sections.label: Control
sections.title: Precise tone adjustments
sections.paragraph: Professional communication depends on nuance. LetterLab allows you to fine-tune tone, confidence level, and formality without rewriting from scratch.
bullets: Make language more confident or softer

sections.label: Structure
sections.title: Clear messages that get replies
sections.paragraph: Emails should be easy to scan. LetterLab emphasizes purpose-first writing, reducing ambiguity and helping recipients understand next steps immediately.

sections.label: Review
sections.title: Send with confidence
sections.paragraph: Before sending, review grammar, formatting, and clarity in one pass. LetterLab highlights awkward phrasing and suggests improvements while keeping your original meaning intact.
